label: 460aaaa Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Area

children.heading: City
children.label: A City
children.text: The term “City” means the city of North Las Vegas, Nevada.

children.heading: Clark County Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Park
children.label: B Clark County Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Park
children.text: The term “Clark County Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Park” means the approximately 960 acres of land identified on the Map as “Clark County Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Park”.

children.heading: County
children.label: C County
children.text: The term “County” means Clark County, Nevada.

children.heading: Map
children.label: D Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Nellis Dunes OHV Recreation Area” and dated .December 17, 2013

children.heading: Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Recreation Area
children.label: E Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Recreation Area
children.text: The term “Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Recreation Area” means the approximately 10,035 acres of land identified on the Map as “Nellis Dunes OHV Recreation Area”.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: F Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: State
children.label: G State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Nevada.

children.heading: Conveyance of Federal land to County
children.label: 2 Conveyance of Federal land to County

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary shall convey to the County, subject to valid existing rights and subparagraph (B), without consideration, all right, title, and interest of the United States in and to the Clark County Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Park.December 19, 2014

children.heading: Reservation of mineral estate
children.label: B Reservation of mineral estate
children.text: In conveying the parcels of Federal land under subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall reserve the mineral estate, except for purposes related to flood mitigation (including removal from aggregate flood events).

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: The parcels of land conveyed under subparagraph (A) may be used by the County for any public purposes described in clause (ii), consistent with the Act of (commonly known as the “Recreation and Public Purposes Act”) ( et seq.).June 14, 192643 U.S.C. 869

children.label: aa
children.text: to provide a suitable location for the establishment of a centralized off-road vehicle recreation park in the County;

children.label: bb
children.text: to provide the public with opportunities for off-road vehicle recreation, including a location for races, competitive events, training and other commercial services that directly support a centralized off-road vehicle recreation area and County park;

children.label: cc
children.text: to provide a designated area and facilities that would discourage unauthorized use of off-highway vehicles in areas that have been identified by the Federal Government, State government, or County government as containing environmentally sensitive land; and

children.label: II
children.text: shall not be disposed of by the County.

children.label: I
children.text: title to the parcel shall revert to the Secretary, at the option of the Secretary; and

children.label: II
children.text: the County shall be responsible for any reclamation necessary to revert the parcel to the United States.

children.label: I
children.text: to enhance public safety and safe off-highway vehicle recreation use in the Nellis Dunes Recreation Area;

children.label: II
children.text: to ensure compatible development with the mission requirements of the Nellis Air Force Base; and

children.label: III
children.text: to avoid and mitigate known public health risks associated with off-highway vehicle use in the Nellis Dunes Recreation Area.

children.heading: Agreement with Nellis Air Force Base
children.label: D Agreement with Nellis Air Force Base
I
children.text: to enhance safe off-highway recreation use; and

children.label: II
children.text: to ensure that development of the Federal land is consistent with the long-term mission requirements of Nellis Air Force Base.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: ii Limitation
children.text: The use of the Federal land conveyed under subparagraph (A) shall not compromise the national security mission of Nellis Air Force Base.

children.heading: Additional terms and conditions
children.label: E Additional terms and conditions
children.text: With respect to the conveyance of Federal land under subparagraph (A), the Secretary may require such additional terms and conditions as the Secretary considers to be appropriate to protect the interests of the United States.

children.heading: Designation of Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Area
children.label: 3 Designation of Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Area

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The approximately 10,035 acres of land identified on the Map as the “Nellis Dunes OHV Recreation Area” shall be known and designated as the “Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Vehicle Recreation Area”.

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: B Management plan
children.text: The Secretary may develop a special management plan for the Nellis Dunes Off-Highway Recreation Area to enhance the safe use of off-highway vehicles for recreational purposes.
